scripts.build:backend: cd .. && pyinstaller --noconfirm --onedir --name vetclinic-backend --add-data "home/templates;home/templates" --add-data "home/static;home/static" --add-data "home/migrations;home/migrations" --hidden-import home.apps --hidden-import whitenoise.middleware --hidden-import psycopg --collect-all psycopg --collect-all psycopg_binary --collect-all openpyxl --collect-all reportlab backend_entry.py
scripts.build:seed: cd .. && python manage.py migrate && python manage.py seed_admin
